description: Set of threeSoft, absorbent, t-shirts made of 100% premium cotton with a crew neck, short sleeves with piping, print on the inner neck and signature branding on the left chest Comes in pink, beige and blue.Wash careMachine washDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron as neededIf you need a basic tee to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. basics knows what they're doing when they come up with practical staples which will make you look and feel great.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
